allow: Bash(cd "/d/LEARNING/Grit Framework/test-app" && echo "=== .pnpm turbo entries ===" && ls node_modules/.pnpm 2>/dev/null | grep -i turbo; echo "=== test-app .npmrc? ===" && cat .npmrc 2>/dev/null || echo "  no .npmrc in test-app"; echo "=== pnpm version ===" && pnpm --version 2>/dev/null; echo "=== node arch ===" && node -e "console.log\(process.platform, process.arch\)" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(SB="/c/Users/USER/AppData/Local/Temp/claude/d--PROJECTS-GO-GRIT-FRAMEWORK-grit/2dd806c3-12d0-4fc2-90e9-2f7984175d57/scratchpad"; EXPO="$SB/verify/vapp/apps/expo"; echo "=== backtick/artifact scan ==="; grep -rn '+ "`" +\\|`{' "$EXPO/app" "$EXPO/components" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "\(none above = clean\)"; echo "=== login imports ==="; grep -n "^import" "$EXPO/app/\(auth\)/login.tsx"; echo "=== tabs uses blur ==="; grep -n "BlurView\\|expo-blur\\|tabBarStyle" "$EXPO/app/\(tabs\)/_layout.tsx" | head; echo "=== deps present ==="; grep -n "expo-linear-gradient\\|expo-blur" "$EXPO/package.json")
